relabelled_senses.definition: A holiday or period of leisure spent doing the same kind of work one does as a job; a working holiday in which one's leisure activity resembles one's usual occupation.
An incident in which a bus falls from a road, cliff, bridge, or into water, typically causing significant damage, injury, or fatalities; a large‑scale bus accident involving a fall.
To shoot someone with a firearm; to fire a bullet at, wound, or kill.
To dance energetically or execute a noticeable dance move, often in order to attract attention or entertain.
To ejaculate; to reach sexual climax.
To work extremely hard or with great intensity to accomplish a task.
To tease, rib, or joke with someone in a good‑natured or playful manner.
To harass, tease, or ridicule someone persistently; to give someone a hard time in a teasing or abusive manner.
To tease, lampoon, or criticize someone in a joking or teasing way; to give someone a hard time.
Very industrious or hardworking; constantly active in productive tasks.
Very busy or constantly engaged in work; industrious and active.
Tasks that occupy time but have little intrinsic value, significance, or productive outcome; work assigned primarily to keep someone busy.
Used after an expression such as 'nothing' or 'naught' to indicate restriction or exclusivity; meaning 'only' or 'merely'.
A transitional formula, often used by performers or speakers, that signals a shift from joking or lighthearted material to a sincere or earnest comment.
A derogatory slang term for a person (typically a woman) whose body is considered attractive while the face is considered unattractive.
A person who is clumsy with their hands and prone to dropping or mishandling objects.
An image used idiomatically to denote an excessive, disproportionate, or unduly severe treatment or punishment of someone or something minor, fragile, or insignificant.
To arrange circumstances or transactions so as to gain an advantage or profit regardless of which of two (or more) outcomes occurs.
To cajole, flatter, or otherwise ingratiate oneself with someone in order to gain favor or an advantage.
To appear, outwardly, extremely demure, prim, or innocent; to give the impression of being incapable of impoliteness or impropriety.
